key_requirements: Module registration pattern: pub fn register() calls register_module(name, attrs)
register_stdlib() in mod.rs must call idlelib_mod::register()
mod.rs pub mod declaration required for new module file
P3 module placement convention in mod.rs (// P3 stdlib modules block)
R2: Module caching via sys.modules — import idlelib must be cacheable
R4: import and from-import syntax — import idlelib and from idlelib import X must work
R5: Module object attributes (__name__, __file__, __dict__) set on registration
NotImplementedError is in the exception hierarchy (R1)
mb_raise(exc_type, message) is the mechanism for raising exceptions from stub functions
Stub functions should call mb_raise with NotImplementedError type and descriptive message
Background context only: stub pattern philosophy for unimplemented functionality
